what_is_working: Twitter agent is successfully posting content
Quora agent is generating answer drafts based on latest video topics
Trend Scout agent is operational and ready to provide insights
what_needs_improvement: Analytics agent is reporting incorrect data
Revenue Tracker agent is predicting a long time to monetization
Multiple agents are failing due to unknown reasons

fix_instructions.Analytics: Check API connection and credentials in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → verify ANALYTICS_API_KEY and ANALYTICS_API_SECRET
fix_instructions.Revenue Tracker: Update revenue tracking formula to reflect current YouTube Partner Program (YPP) requirements → review and update REVENUE_TRACKER_FORMULA in codebase
fix_instructions.Competitor Spy: Verify competitor video analysis script and update tags and formulas accordingly → check COMPETITOR_SPY_SCRIPT for errors and update TAGS_AND_FORMULAS in database
fix_instructions.SEO Optimizer: Investigate why SEO updates are not being applied correctly → review SEO_OPTIMIZER_LOGS for errors and update SEO_OPTIMIZER_SCRIPT as needed
fix_instructions.Video Reviewer: Initialize Video Reviewer agent by setting up VIDEO_REVIEWER_CONFIG in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add VIDEO_REVIEWER_CONFIG
fix_instructions.Instagram: Instagram agent is missing INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN
fix_instructions.Reddit: Reddit agent is missing REDDIT_ACCESS_TOKEN in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add REDDIT_ACCESS_TOKEN
